headline: 3 Senators Reject CLARITY Act Ahead of Key Vote

article.title: Three US senators oppose CLARITY Act on ethics grounds with vote expected soon
article.summary: Senate Majority Leader John Thune reportedly said the chamber will consider a vote on the crypto market structure bill before Aug. 10, though it’s unclear whether it has enough Democratic support to pass.

headline: Velocity Secures $38M for Stablecoin Treasury Expansion

article.title: Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
article.summary: Backed by Dragonfly, FirstMark and Coinbase Ventures, the startup is expanding software that helps businesses integrate stablecoins into treasury and payment workflows.

headline: Bitcoin Softfork Falters Amid 20% Junk Data Surge

article.title: The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The Bitcoin Softfork That Tried to Police “Junk Data” — And Why It’s Already Failing
Bitcoin’s real power is that anyone willing to pay fees can write to the ledger. BIP-110’s backers want to change that for data-heavy transactions. The backlash reveals what’s truly at stake.

article.title: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
article.summary: Demis Hassabis says artificial general intelligence is only a few years away and proposes a new U.S. standards body to test frontier AI models before release.

headline: Ethereum Privacy Arm Spins Out With $10M Backing
